rite.title: Zoning compliance according to RITE 178/2021
rite.description: The 2021 RITE updates the rules for thermal zoning in buildings, requiring that installations be designed by clearly defined thermal zones. This allows for precise regulation of heating, cooling and ventilation according to the real needs of each space, optimizing energy efficiency and indoor comfort.

integration.title: Communication and integration with A/C and fan coil units
integration.description: Unified management of direct expansion and fan coil units from the leading brands on the market. Total control of the indoor unit from the MYSAir system, guaranteeing unified central control.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.description: We solve the most common doubts about our air conditioning and zoning systems
faqs.not_found: Can't find the answer you're looking for?
faqs.a1: Zoning consists of dividing a home or business into different areas, independently controlling the temperature and air flow using motorized grilles and smart thermostats.
faqs.q2: What are the advantages of installing zoning grilles?
faqs.a2: They allow for personalized comfort, reduce energy consumption, avoid air conditioning empty areas and help save on the electricity bill.
faqs.q3: Can zoning be installed in an existing ducted air system?
faqs.a3: Yes, in most cases a ducted air conditioning system can be adapted by installing motorized grilles and a centralized control system.
faqs.q4: What modern technologies do zoning systems include?
faqs.a4: Current systems integrate with home automation, voice assistants, geolocation and time schedules, allowing for greater comfort and efficiency.
faqs.q5: How much can be saved with a zoning system?
faqs.a5: Savings vary by use, but an estimated reduction in electricity consumption of between 20% and 40% compared to traditional systems without zoning.

footer.description: Specialists in integral solutions for air conditioning and ventilation regulation and control. High-quality air diffusion and zoning systems.

testimonials.t3: Exceptional professionals. From the first contact to the final installation, everything was perfect. I recommend MYSAIR without hesitation.
